turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Haan, mujhe apna appointment cancel karna hai. Kal ka tha.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Ji, zaroor. Aapka naam aur kaunse doctor ke saath appointment tha?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Rajesh Solanki. Dr. Kavitha Reddy ke saath. Kal 2 baje.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Haan, dekh raha hoon. Rajesh Solanki, kal 2 PM, Dr. Kavitha Reddy. Cancel karna chahte hain completely ya reschedule?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Sirf cancel. Abhi schedule nahi karunga.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Theek hai. Aapka appointment cancel ho gaya. Koi cancellation charge nahi hai kyunki aapne 24 ghante pehle inform kiya. Kuch aur madad chahiye?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Nahi, bas yahi chahiye tha. Dhanyawaad.
